codes.ADDRESS_STRING_AMBIGUITY: Address-string comparison is forbidden; use exact script bytes
codes.ALLOCATION_EXCEEDS_POOL: Total issuance would exceed the fixed genesis pool
codes.ALLOCATION_NONCANONICAL: Allocation record is not the canonical proportional result
codes.AMOUNT_MISMATCH: Claimed amount does not match donation output value
codes.AMOUNT_NOT_POSITIVE: Eligible donation amount is not a positive integer
codes.ARITHMETIC_OVERFLOW: Allocation arithmetic overflowed or used non-integer values
codes.CHARITY_ID_UNKNOWN: Charity identifier is not in the genesis set
codes.CHARITY_INACTIVE: Charity entry is outside its validity window
codes.CHARITY_SCRIPT_MISMATCH: Output script bytes do not match genesis entry
codes.CLAIM_AFTER_CUTOFF: Claim submitted after epoch close / last-clean checkpoint
codes.COMMITMENT_FIELD_MISMATCH: Commitment fields disagree with claim body
codes.COMMITMENT_INVALID: Donation commitment binding does not verify
codes.CROSS_CHAIN_REPLAY: Claim attempts replay across chain identifiers
codes.CROSS_EPOCH_REPLAY: Claim attempts replay across migration epochs
codes.DUPLICATE_CHARITY_ENTRY: Genesis charity set contains a duplicate identifier
codes.EPOCH_CLOSED: Migration epoch is closed; no further claims admitted
codes.HEADER_ANCESTRY_INVALID: Source header is not in accepted checkpoint ancestry
codes.INCLUSION_AFTER_CUTOFF: Source inclusion height is after epoch cutoff
codes.INCLUSION_PROOF_INVALID: Merkle inclusion proof does not verify
codes.NULLIFIER_ALREADY_CONSUMED: Donation nullifier has already been consumed
codes.NULLIFIER_COLLISION: Nullifier collides under domain-omission or ambiguity attempt
codes.NULLIFIER_DOMAIN_OMISSION: Nullifier preimage omitted required domain separation
codes.OK: Claim admitted under the synthetic verifier model
codes.PQ_ALGORITHM_UNSUPPORTED: PQ algorithm tag is not supported by this verifier
codes.PQ_DOMAIN_INVALID: PQ signature domain separation is wrong or omitted
codes.PQ_KEY_WRONG: Signature does not match bound PQ destination public key
codes.QUANTUM_COMPROMISE_CUTOFF: Classical source authorization after quantum-cutoff height
codes.SCRIPT_SUBSTITUTION: Output script differs from genesis-committed script
codes.SOURCE_AUTH_INVALID: Source-chain authorization does not demonstrate control
codes.STALE_CHECKPOINT: Checkpoint is stale relative to declared last-clean tip
codes.TX_MALLEABILITY_REENCODING: Transaction re-encoding changes identity under model rules
codes.TYPE_ERROR: Field has the wrong type or encoding
codes.UNSUPPORTED_SCRIPT_FORM: Output script form is outside the synthetic model
codes.UNSUPPORTED_TX_FORM: Transaction form is outside the synthetic model
codes.WRONG_OUTPUT_INDEX: Commitment or claim points at the wrong output index
